chunks.en: Today I want to talk about starting my work computer.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事のパソコンを起動する話をしたいです。

chunks.en: First I press the power button and wait.
chunks.ja: まず電源ボタンを押して待ちます。

chunks.en: First I look at the small light on it.
chunks.ja: まず本体の小さなライトを見ます。

chunks.en: Then I type my password to log in.
chunks.ja: それからパスワードを入力してログインします。

chunks.en: Sometimes it is very slow in the morning.
chunks.ja: 朝はとても遅いこともあります。

chunks.en: Then I open the apps I need for work.
chunks.ja: それから仕事に必要なアプリを開きます。

chunks.en: Then I check my email and chat first.
chunks.ja: それからまずメールとチャットを確認します。

chunks.en: That's how I start my day at work.
chunks.ja: そんなふうに私は仕事の一日を始めます。

outline: Point 1: power button, then password login
Point 2: slow mornings, then open apps
Wrap-up: how I start my day

modelTalk.text: I start my work computer every morning. First, I press the power button. Then I wait a little. The screen turns on slowly. I see the login page now. I type my password to log in. I try to type it right. Sometimes it's really slow in the morning. I just wait and drink my coffee. It's okay, I'm not in a hurry. Soon the computer is ready. Then I open the apps I need. I open my email and my calendar. I open my chat app too. Now I can start my work. It's easy, and I do this every day.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about starting my work computer.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事のパソコンを起動することについて話したいです。

chunks.en: First I press the power button and wait a little.
chunks.ja: まず電源ボタンを押して、少し待ちます。

chunks.en: Then I type my password to log in.
chunks.ja: それからパスワードを入力してログインします。

chunks.en: Sometimes it is slow in the morning.
chunks.ja: 朝は遅いこともあります。

chunks.en: So I get some coffee while I wait.
chunks.ja: だから待っている間にコーヒーを取りに行きます。

chunks.en: After that I open the apps I need.
chunks.ja: そのあと、必要なアプリを開きます。

chunks.en: That's how I start my work every day.
chunks.ja: こんなふうに私は毎日仕事を始めます。

outline: Opening: talk about starting my computer
Point 1: press power and log in
Point 2: it's slow, so I wait
Wrap-up: open apps and start work

modelTalk.text: I start my work day like this. First I press the power button. Then I wait for a minute. The screen turns on slowly. Next I type my password to log in. I try to type it right. Sometimes it's slow in the morning. The computer needs some time to wake up. So I just wait and stay calm. I don't get angry about it. After that, I open the apps I need. I open my email first. Then I open my chat app too. Now I'm ready to start. It's not hard. I do it every day. That's my simple morning at work.
